overview: Nexiqo is a dark-themed social media app centered on short video reels, a smart AI-powered feed, and real-time connections. It features a premium blue-to-purple gradient design with glass morphism UI, bottom navigation across Home, Reels, Friends, and Chat, plus a full onboarding and authentication flow.
features: Splash screen with dark gradient and logo
Smart home feed with stories and mixed content
Full-screen reels player with swipe navigation
Bottom navigation: Home, Reels, Create, Friends, Chat
Create button with glow effect and action menu
Friends screen with suggestions and follow/unfollow
Profile screen with cover photo, bio, stats, and tabs
Premium dark design: blue→purple gradient, glass morphism, neon accents
